title: Synopsys Initiates $300 Million Accelerated Share Repurchase Agreement
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced that it has entered into an accelerated share repurchase agreement (ASR) with Wells Fargo Bank, NA to repurchase an aggregate of $300 million of Synopsys stock.

title: Synopsys (SNPS) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Synopsys (SNPS) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended July 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Synopsys (SNPS) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Synopsys (SNPS) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.88 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.73 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.10 per share a year ago.

title: The Afterhours: Cisco, Wolfspeed, Synopsys, Vivos
text: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) delivered a strong 4Q earnings report that came in ahead of expectations on Wednesday after market close, sending its shares 2.2% higher in extended trading.  The communications firm reported revenue of $15.2 billion for the quarter compared to the $15.05 billion expected by the Street, while its adjusted earnings per share came in at $1.14 versus $1.06 expected.

title: Chip designer Synopsys stock climbs on fiscal 3Q earnings surprise
text: Synopsys shares rose after the bell Wednesday after the company's fiscal third-quarter earnings came in ahead of expectations.  The chip design firm posted earnings of $2.88 per share on revenue of $1.49 billion, compared to Street expectations of $2.47 per share and $1.48 billion, respectively.

title: Synopsys Rises on Earnings Beat; Names New Chief Executive
text: Synopsys shares climbed following an earnings report that beat analyst expectations and a chief executive transition plan.

title: Synopsys stock rises as chip-design company's earnings, outlook top Street view
text: Synopsys Inc. shares rose in the extended session Wednesday after the chip-design verification and automation company topped Wall Street earnings expectations and named a new chief executive.

title: Synopsys Posts Financial Results for Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2023
text: Announces Sassine Ghazi to Assume President and CEO Role Effective Jan. 1, 2024 Q3 FY 2023 Summary Record quarterly revenue of $1.487 billion, up 19% year over year. GAAP earnings per diluted share of $2.17; non-GAAP earnings per diluted share of $2.88, exceeded high end of guidance.

title: Synopsys Announces Sassine Ghazi to Assume President and CEO Role Jan. 1, 2024
text: Aart de Geus to Take Role of Executive Chair at that Time SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced that its Board of Directors has appointed Sassine Ghazi as president and Chief Executive Officer effective on Jan. 1, 2024.

title: Intel and Synopsys Expand Partnership to Enable Leading IP on Intel Advanced Process Nodes
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif. & SUNNYVALE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Intel (Nasdaq: INTC) and Synopsys (Nasdaq: SNPS) announced that they have entered into a definitive agreement to expand the companies' long-standing IP (intellectual property) and EDA (electronic design automation) strategic partnership with the development of a portfolio of IP on Intel 3 and Intel 18A for Intel's foundry customers. The availability of key IP on Intel advanced process nodes will create a more robust offering for new and existing Intel Foundry Services (IFS) customers.

title: Synopsys (SNPS) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?

title: Synopsys Partners with NowSecure and Secure Code Warrior to Expand Industry-Leading Application Security Testing Solutions Portfolio
text: Agreements Provide Enterprises with Enhanced Mobile Application Security Testing Capabilities, Access to Thousands of Agile Secure Code Learning Experiences for Developers SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced the details around two new collaboration agreements with NowSecure, recognized experts in mobile security and privacy, and Secure Code Warrior, provider of the leading agile learning platform for developer-driven security, to expand its Software Integrity Group's industry-leading portfolio of application security testing (AST) solutions.

title: Synopsys Appoints Rob Painter to Board of Directors
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced the appointment of Rob Painter to its board of directors.

title: 3 ‘Strong Buy' Stocks You Should Be Loading Up On Now

title: Synopsys Launches Software Risk Manager to Simplify Enterprise-Scale Application Security Testing
text: New Solution Combines Policy-Driven Test Orchestration and Vulnerability Management with Market-Leading AST Engines to Help Teams Maximize AppSec Program ROI SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced the launch of Synopsys Software Risk Manager, a powerful new application security posture management (ASPM) solution.
